figures.caption: TABLE I DEPLOYMENT SUCCESS RATES ON THE 19-TASK ROBOTWIN BENCHMARK UNDER A MATCHED 300-STEP BUDGET. THE TWO METHODS SHARE THE SAME UPSTREAM VLA STACK; ONLY THE ACTION DECODER DIFFERS.
Fig. 3. Qualitative EqM inference trajectory on click alarmclock, showing early attraction, semantic shaping, and over-refinement.
Fig. 2. Threshold scans on two RoboTwin tasks. The preferred threshold differs across tasks, so the same residual threshold changes both solver cost and closed-loop behavior.

Fig. 1. Overview of π0-EqM. We replace only the action decoder in π0 and cast action generation as iterative equilibrium solving, enabling adaptive stopping and warm starts. An executable intermediate action may appear before full numerical convergence.
